issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: deploy-chatwoot-docker-compose
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric, while Response A omits many required variables, images, and volume names.

scenarios.name: create-chatwoot-contact-api
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A uses different env vars, wrong endpoint, and wrong header.
